scripts.build: pnpm --filter @ma-core/shared build && pnpm --filter @ma-core/api build && cd apps/web && NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 pnpm exec next build
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @ma-core/shared build && pnpm --filter @ma-core/api lint && pnpm --filter @ma-core/web lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @ma-core/shared build && pnpm --filter @ma-core/api typecheck && pnpm --filter @ma-core/web typecheck
scripts.ci: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm migrate && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm lint && pnpm build
scripts.verify:static: node scripts/static-audit.mjs && node scripts/part2-safety-audit.mjs && node scripts/github-pages-audit.mjs
scripts.verify:full: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && pnpm verify:static && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm lint && pnpm build && pnpm e2e
scripts.build:web: cd apps/web && NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 NEXT_PRIVATE_BUILD_WORKER=1 pnpm exec next build
scripts.e2e:mock: pnpm build:web && E2E_MOCK_API=true pnpm exec playwright test -c apps/web/playwright.config.ts --project=chromium
scripts.visual:qa:mock: pnpm build:web && E2E_MOCK_API=true pnpm exec playwright test -c apps/web/playwright.config.ts --project=chromium --grep @visual
scripts.build:github-pages: pnpm --filter @ma-core/shared build && cd apps/web && NEXT_PUBLIC_DEPLOY_TARGET=github-pages NEXT_PUBLIC_DEMO_MODE=true NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 NEXT_PRIVATE_BUILD_WORKER=1 pnpm exec next build && touch out/.nojekyll
